title: Poster: Plan First
subtitleProgress: Question {{current}} of {{total}}: Choose posters that promote good planning!

stages.question: Which poster would best teach kids the first step in financial planning?
What poster would best show what to do when planning your money?

choices.text: Plan how to balance your money ⚖️

stages.question: Which poster would best explain why planning your spending is important?

choices.text: To know where your money goes 📊

stages.question: What poster would best illustrate a good strategy for planning your money?

choices.text: Spend whenever you feel like it 🎲

stages.question: Which poster would best show the benefit of planning before making purchases?

choices.text: You can spend more money overall 💸
